system.description:
Battle-Brothers are born tough. Even before being gifted with their Chapter's gene-seed, they are selected for their endurance and physical stamina, a trait that only strengthens over time. Once per game session, a Battle-Brother may use his Extreme Endurance to fortify his constitution, granting him a re-roll on all Toughness Tests for a number of hours equal to his Rank.

RankImprovement
7May add +20 to the result of the re-roll
system.effect: Re-roll all Toughness Tests for a number of hours equal to Rank (once per session)

improvements.effect: May add +20 to the result of the re-roll
